case_title: LEV SHAPIRO VS. STEPHEN C. FU et al

docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN REPLY TO OPPOS TO MOTION TO STRIKE FILED BY DEFENDANT FU, STEPHEN C.

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT STEPHEN FU'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. NO FACTS HAVE BEEN ALLEGED THAT PROVIDE A BASIS FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED LEAVE TO AMEND TO SET FORTH ADDITIONAL FACTS THAT PROVIDES A BASIS FOR THIS CLAIM. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-30-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT STEPHEN FU'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is granted. No facts have been alleged that provide a basis for punitive damages. Plaintiff is granted leave to amend to set forth additional facts that provides a basis for this claim. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/JW) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
